From: Chartering YB Global <chartering@ybglobalshipping.com>

Subject: TONNAGE REQUIREMENT – YB GLOBAL SHIPPING LLC FZ // 2 X 58K - 65K DWT SUPRA/ULTRAMAX // FULLY FIRM ORDER

Good day.
